## Quality Check

- [ ] Resource is actively maintained (updated within last 6 months)
- [ ] Resource is not a duplicate of an existing entry
- [ ] Description follows the format: `[Name](URL) - Description. \`Type\` \`Language\``
- [ ] Description is concise (one sentence, ends with a period)
- [ ] Added to the appropriate section and subsection
- [ ] No broken links
